# Phase 1 Fixture Matrix

These fixtures model common repository archetypes used to validate DevSync detection heuristics.

Current fixture count: 10.

Coverage:
- Node package manager detection (npm/pnpm/yarn)
- Python package manager detection (uv/poetry/pipenv/pip)
- Rust toolchain pin detection
- Compose service extraction (postgres/redis/mysql/mongodb)
- Mixed stack repository handling
